description_long: This car store is a large, rectangular commercial building with a flat, dark roof and a prominent L-shaped layout. The structure is surrounded by landscaped areas featuring clusters of trees and shrubs, giving it a well-maintained appearance. A main road runs adjacent to the building, with several parked and moving cars visible, suggesting easy access for customers. The facade appears solid and windowless, with no visible glass panels or large display windows, and the entrance is not clearly marked. The exterior is finished in a light, neutral color, contrasting with the dark roof. The overall design is functional and modern, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on accessibility and vehicle display.
description: A modern, L-shaped car store with a flat dark roof, landscaped surroundings, and adjacent road access. The facade is solid and windowless, with a clean, functional design.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the car store from an angle highlighting the landscaped area and the adjacent road with several cars, as well as the building's L-shaped footprint.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a head-on perspective of the main facade, emphasizing the building's width and the arrangement of trees and shrubs in front.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear and side of the building, with the road running parallel and more landscaping visible, but no clear entrance.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a view from the opposite side, showing the continuation of the road, the landscaped area, and the solid, windowless facade.
